name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express Philadelphia, Pennsylvania — ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with phy...
description_long:
ACE Cash Express operates a nationwide network of physical store locations providing rapid access to emergency cash and financial services. The company has been serving consumers who need quick access to funds, with store locations mentioned in multiple states including Colorado and Louisiana. Their service model centers on providing fast cash solutions rather than traditional banking relationships.

The company's core service offerings include installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services. They also advertise online loan options and business services. The website indicates they serve as a financial access point for consumers seeking same-day or next-day funding solutions. Their breadth of services suggests positioning as a comprehensive alternative financial services provider beyond just payday loans.

ACE distinguishes itself through physical store presence and multi-service bundling, allowing customers to access various financial services at single locations. The company maintains dedicated customer service lines for general inquiries and online loan operations, and operates a store locator system to help customers find nearby branches. They also advertise promotional offerings like the Target gift card sweepstakes mentioned on their site.

However, the website content provided is limited—both sample URLs returned 404 errors, preventing assessment of specific terms, APR rates, eligibility requirements, or detailed product information. The notice that certain loan types are unavailable in some states suggests regulatory constraints. Without access to complete product details, interest rates, and terms, consumers should verify current offerings and costs directly before applying.
pros: Multiple service types available at single locations (loans, check cashing, money transfers, bill payments, tax services)
Online loan application option available in addition to in-store services
Nationwide store network with physical locations for in-person service
Dedicated customer service lines for both general inquiries and online loan support
Store locator tool to help customers find nearby locations
Title loans available as collateral-based borrowing option
Tax services offered at select locations
cons: Website content limited and partially inaccessible; specific APR rates, terms, and fees not disclosed in provided materials
Certain loan products unavailable in some states, creating inconsistent service availability
High-cost lending category typically associated with triple-digit APR rates (standard for emergency-cash category)
No information provided about credit-building features, financial counseling, or debt management support
Limited transparency in website content prevents full assessment of consumer protections and disclosure quality
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash access and willing to visit physical locations
Customers seeking bundled financial services (loans, check cashing, money transfers) in one place
People with collateral who may qualify for title loans
Those requiring tax preparation services alongside emergency borrowing
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers in urgent need of small emergency loans who have access to physical store locations and prefer in-person transactions. Primary caveat: this is a high-cost lending option typical of the emergency-cash category; consumers should compare APR rates with payday-alternatives (credit union PALs, CDFIs) before borrowing, and verify that specific products are available in their state.
services: Credit cards (referenced but details not provided)
Customer service via phone and email

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
